mechanics.excerpt: Though roleplaying such games may be more fun, Gambling Action Check can be used instead quickly determine character' $ success such games high Margin of Success indicates large winnings while high Margin of Failure indicates large losses; as rule 0f thumb multiply the character' $ Margin of Success (or Failure) by 10 to find the percent of the starting stake won (or lost): Gunnery / Laser This subskill iS used for direct-fire weapons that use lasers, flames or charged particles to damage their target by heating it, including all kinds of lasers_ particle projection cannons and flamers Gunnery / Missile This subskill iS used for all kinds of missile launchers_ they direct indirect fire including long , medium: ad short: range missiles as well as variant missile launchers such streak SRMs and the Clan advanced tactical missile system: Missile artillery uses the Artillery Skill, not this subskill.
